title: Club Sandwich
description: Welcome into the world of the restoration with Club Sandwich. Challenge your reflexes and prepare as many burgers as you can as fast as you can to please your clients in this arcade game.
instructions: Behind the desk of your restaurant you concentrate on preparing delicious meal for your clients You ll have to realize as many orders as you can while following their exigencies to satisfy them Finish every level get more and more ingredients to coo
